identity.description: Creative Designer producing top 1% designs. Fusion of disciplines, emotion-first, content-directed.

headings.usage: All section headers, dashboard metrics, widget titles. Must be uppercase for tracking-widest labels.
headings.letter_spacing: tracking-tight for large text, tracking-widest for overlines

body.usage: Data tables, form inputs, paragraphs, tooltips.

primary.description: Amber/Yellow - Main Actions, Active States, 'Egg' Status

destructive.description: Pink - Critical Alerts, 'Female' Gender Marker, Deletions

aviary_view.item_style: Visual Cage Card - 1px border, status indicator top-right

variants.primary: bg-[#FFC300] text-[#1A2035] hover:bg-[#FFC300]/90 font-bold uppercase tracking-wider

textures.grid: Use subtle grid lines in background of Aviary View

hero_bird.description: Close up yellow canary for welcome/hero widget

cage_texture.description: Wire mesh texture for cage backgrounds or sidebar

universal_guidelines: Avoid gradients on text. Use solid colors for legibility.
Use 'Barlow Condensed' for all headings to give an industrial/inventory feel.
Buttons must contrast sharply with the dark background (Use #FFC300).
All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes.
Do not use native HTML date pickers; use Shadcn Calendar.
Do not use native HTML selects; use Shadcn Select.
Bird Cards in Aviary view must show: Cage Number, Male ID, Female ID, Status (Laying/Incubating/etc).
Status colors must be consistent: Yellow=Laying, Orange=Incubating, Teal=Hatched/Banded.
instructions_to_main_agent: Configure Tailwind with the custom colors defined in 'colors.palette'.
Create a 'Layout' component that wraps the app with the dark theme and sidebar.
Use the Bento Grid strategy for the Dashboard page.
Implement the Bird Registry as a sortable/filterable table.
